title: Salesforce API Authentication Failure - Invalid Session Token
error_message: The session ID or OAuth token used has expired or is invalid.
root_cause: OAuth token expired after 2 hours due to session timeout policy configuration.
resolution_steps: Refresh OAuth token using the refresh token grant type
Update connection credentials in integration middleware with new session ID
Verify session timeout settings in Salesforce Security Controls

title: HubSpot API Authentication Failure - Invalid Access Token
error_message: Authentication failed: Access token expired or invalid, unable to sync contact data.
root_cause: OAuth refresh token expired due to 6-month inactivity period exceeding HubSpot's token lifecycle.
resolution_steps: Regenerate OAuth access token through HubSpot developer portal and update integration credentials
Verify API key scopes include contacts read/write permissions and re-authorize application
Implement automated token refresh mechanism to prevent future expiration issues

title: SAP RFC Connection Timeout During Invoice Data Extraction
error_message: RFC connection to SAP system timed out after 60 seconds during BAPI_INVOICE_GETLIST execution.
root_cause: Network latency increased due to firewall rule changes blocking SAP gateway port 3300.
resolution_steps: Verify firewall rules allow traffic on SAP gateway port 3300
Increase RFC timeout parameter to 120 seconds in connection settings
Test connection using SAP GUI and validate BAPI response time

title: ServiceNow REST API Authentication Failure
error_message: Authentication failed with 401 Unauthorized when attempting to connect to ServiceNow REST API endpoint.
root_cause: OAuth token expired and refresh token was not properly configured in integration credentials.
resolution_steps: Regenerate OAuth credentials in ServiceNow Application Registry and update integration configuration
Verify refresh token mechanism is enabled and token rotation schedule is configured properly
Test connection with new credentials and monitor authentication logs for 24 hours

title: Salesforce API Authentication Failure - OAuth Token Expired
error_message: Authentication failed with error code 401. OAuth access token has expired and refresh failed.
root_cause: OAuth refresh token invalidated due to password reset. Connected app session policy requires re-authentication.
resolution_steps: Revoke existing OAuth tokens and re-authenticate the connected app with valid credentials
Update connected app session timeout policies to 12 hours in Salesforce setup
Implement automated token refresh mechanism with proper error handling and retry logic
